nasb.text: They took their livestock and their property, which they had acquired in the land of Canaan, and came to Egypt, Jacob and all his descendants with him:

esv.text: They also took their livestock and their goods, which they had gained in the land of Canaan, and came into Egypt, Jacob and all his offspring with him,

cnv.text: 他們又帶著牲畜，和他們在迦南地所得的財物，來到埃及。這樣，雅各和他所有的子孫，都一同來了。

ccb.text: 带着在迦南获得的牲畜和财物前往埃及。这样，雅各带着他所有的子孙，

csbs.text: 他们还带上牲畜和在迦南地所积蓄的财物。于是雅各和他所有的子孙都一同来到埃及。
